creator: AgentEvalHQ

evidence.text:
AgentEval is the comprehensive .NET toolkit for AI agent evaluation—tool usage validation, RAG quality metrics, stochastic evaluation, and model comparison—built first for Microsoft Agent Framework (MAF) and Microsoft.Extensions.AI. What RAGAS, PromptFoo and DeepEval do for Python, AgentEval does for .NET ﻿# AgentEval

The .NET Evaluation Toolkit for AI Agents
